results.title: Queiroz: Teenage sensation Yirenkyi ready for big stage
results.description: Carlos Queiroz has thrown his full weight behind teenage sensation Caleb Yirenkyi, declaring the youngster a future midfield cornerstone for Ghana as the Black Stars emerged from a bruising 2026 FIFA World Cup opener convinced they can trouble both England and Croatia.

results.title: Eloy Room helps Curacao record first World Cup point with historic performance
results.description: It may not have been a win, but Curacao still had a huge night on Saturday. Its 0-0 draw with Ecuador at the 2026 FIFA World Cup was the first point for Curacao in World Cup competition.

results.title: Afgone against invincible India
results.description: Gill’s first-ever ODI series win as a captain, as India blanks Afghanistan 3-0 with Chepauk win

results.title: World Cup 2026: Germany wins Group E, will play at Gillette in Round of 32
results.description: The Germans secured first place in their group after Ecuador drew with Curaçao Saturday night.

results.title: Zoe Marshall reveals eye-watering MDMA therapy bill and exactly what husband Benji thought of the controversial treatment
results.description: Zoe Marshall underwent the intensive psychedelic treatment over the course of several months in the hope it would help alleviate her mental health struggles.

results.title: Phantastic performances: Phillies’ Schwarber homers twice in inning, Harper hits for cycle vs Mets
results.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Kyle Schwarber launched two long home runs in the Philadelphia Phillies’ eight-run third inning against the New York Mets on Saturday night and Bryce Harper became the 11th player in franchise history to hit for the cycle.
